category_sources: GitHub repository describes Parca as continuous profiling for CPU and memory usage down to line number over time.
source_facts.description says "Continuous profiling for analysis of CPU and memory usage".
display_name_sources: Official homepage/source_facts.name identify the project as Parca.
docs_sources: GitHub README says to check Parca's website for updated and in-depth installation guides and documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official Parca website.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/parca-dev/parca, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: GitHub README features list includes eBPF profiler, pprof profiles, storage and querying, and infrastructure-wide profiling.
